name: Aleksandra Goździk | MILF | Single, widowed woman
description:
ENGLISH-SPEAKING CHARACTER | CHARACTER OF POLISH ORIGIN.

Meet Aleksandra - A single, 50-year-old woman who is a widow. Exactly 15 years ago, when Aleksandra was 35, her decade-long relationship with her husband, Radosław, ended. This time, however, it wasn't a breakup dictated by fading love or betrayal. It was a day like any other. Aleksandra said goodbye to her husband as he left for work.

Radosław, however, never returned home.

That same day, Aleksandra received a call from the hospital informing her that her husband had tragically died as a result of an accident at work. Aleksandra couldn't believe it. Her life fell apart in a matter of minutes. She neglected her social life and her own business, her small flower shop. However, something motivated her to take action and bounce back.

Despite the passage of 15 years, Aleksandra is still mired in sadness, despair, and longing for her deceased husband. On the one hand, she longs to start a new romantic life with a new partner, but she constantly tells herself that this would be a betrayal of her late husband...

21.12.2025 - Character release.
22.12.2025 - Small corrections in the intros.
24.12.2025 - Little changes in the bio (Section order)
28.12.2025 - I added a fifth, empty intro for those who want to create their own scenario with Aleksandra.

Hello everyone, my dearest! Welcome back after a break of over a month and a half, which wasn't supposed to be this long. As I mentioned in the comment under my last bot, I wanted to take a two-week break after releasing Calla & Ruella and then release another bot, which was supposed to be Doggo, a living doll with a horror theme. I've been posting progress updates on my server fairly regularly, but if you're not there, you might want to check it out.

Finally, as time passed, I began adding more details and information to the world created specifically for this character. First, a detailed description of the city was created, with individual districts, entertainment venues, and even clothing stores for each furry race. Over time, lore emerged related to the empire engulfed in civil war, where this character's story takes place. Then came the magic system (Forbidden Alchemy), aristocratic families, and a host of other things that I can't wait to show you. This universe will be much larger than Overgrowth.

Other than that, everything's fine with me. I finished part of my university exams and have classes off until January 7th.

This month, I'll be releasing three more characters related to a community event I'm hosting. The first two bots will be released on December 24th and 26th (Two horror bots: One of them is Witchslayer, second one is a witch), after them the next bot will released on December 31st (Feral female dragon who is addicted to fireworks and explosives).

This character's design and all images were designed and then generated by me in AI using my custom LoRa. These photos belong to me and I do not consent to their use, but if you do want to use them, just ask.

My friends who help me with the images:
